title: uraria lagopus
intro: Uraria lagopus, also known as Burra or Kidney Bean Tree, is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of various alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Uraria lagopus include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and arthritis. Herbal preparations of Uraria lagopus include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health issues.
